summary: Channel Health Dashboard testing complete. Backend API (GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health) returns correct JSON structure with all required fields. Frontend Channel Health tab renders correctly with KPI cards, Provider SLA, Reconciliation Drift, and Provider Sync sections. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend channel_health_aggregator.py correctly implements all 6 aggregation functions with proper MongoDB pipelines
Dashboard router correctly exposes GET /channel-health endpoint with hours query parameter (1-168 range)
Frontend ChannelHealthDashboard.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ControlPlane.jsx correctly integrates Channel Health tab with data-testid='tab-channel-health'
All UI text is in Turkish as requested (Kanal Sagligi, Drift Sayisi, Sync Basari, etc.)
Real data from MongoDB collections (cm_rate_push_metrics, cm_connectors, cm_sync_jobs, cm_reconciliation_issues) is being displayed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel Health Dashboard fully verified. Backend endpoint /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health returns push_latency, sync_metrics, failure_breakdown, reconciliation_drift, retry_metrics, provider_summary, provider_sla fields. Frontend tab at /control-plane with data-testid='tab-channel-health'. Real data shows hotelrunner provider with 875 drift issues, 0% sync success rate, warning SLA status.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health.returns: push_latency, sync_metrics, failure_breakdown, reconciliation_drift, retry_metrics, provider_summary, provider_sla, period_hours, calculated_at
